## Checklist

- [ ] I opened (or linked) an issue before writing code, and the approach was agreed.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally.
- [ ] I manually exercised the changed flow on at least one OS (macOS / Linux / Windows).
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, license keys, or personal env files.
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `test:`).
- [ ] No AI-tool signatures, co-author trailers, or "generated by" notes in commits.
- [ ] Docs / README updated if user-visible behaviour changed.
